name: Steampunk Genre Preset
author: Voyage Team
description: A complete steampunk genre preset with Victorian-era clockwork aesthetics, featuring airships, automatons, and brass-and-copper technology.

genres.name: Steampunk
genres.description: A world of brass gears, steam power, and Victorian innovation. Airships ply the skies while clockwork automatons serve the great industrial empires.

events.title: Aether Pirates Attack
events.description: A brass-hulled airship descends from the smog clouds, its crew of goggled pirates demanding tribute. Their captain, adorned in leather and brass fittings, calls for your cargo or your lives.

choices.text: Prepare the steam cannons for battle

outcome.description: Your crew mans the weapons. Brass shells exchange through the air, and after a fierce engagement, the pirates retreat into the smog.

choices.text: Pay the tribute in brass ingots

outcome.description: You hand over a portion of your brass stores. The pirates tip their goggles in mock courtesy and ascend back into the clouds.

choices.text: Attempt to outrun them with full steam

outcome.description: Your engineers pour coal into the furnace. The vessel lurches forward, leaving the slower pirate ship behind in a trail of steam.

choices.text: Offer to trade information for safe passage

outcome.description: You share knowledge of a wealthy merchant route. The pirates, intrigued by potential larger prey, let you pass with a knowing nod.

events.title: Abandoned Automaton Factory
events.description: Your crew discovers a derelict factory half-buried in rust and weeds. Inside, rows of dormant automatons stand like metal soldiers, and intact blueprints litter the workbenches.

outcome.description: Your gearwrights dismantle several automatons, recovering valuable gears and steam cores.
The blueprints reveal advanced engineering techniques. Your crew's understanding of clockwork mechanisms improves.
With careful work, you bring one automaton back to life. It now serves as a tireless helper for your crew.

choices.text: Mark the location and move on

outcome.description: You note the factory's position for future reference and continue your journey.

events.title: Aether Storm
events.description: The sky crackles with unnatural energy as an aether storm rolls across the region. Lightning dances between brass spires, and strange harmonics fill the air.

choices.text: Ground the vessel and wait it out

outcome.description: Your crew deploys copper grounding rods. The storm passes overhead, its fury spent on the earth around you.

choices.text: Attempt to harvest the aether energy

outcome.description: Your engineers rig collectors to capture the storm's energy. The risk pays off with a bounty of aether crystals.
Your vessel takes a beating but emerges on the other side. Some systems are damaged but you saved time.

events.title: Boiler Failure
events.description: A critical rupture in the main boiler sends steam venting dangerously. Without repairs, your vessel cannot move.

outcome.description: Your engineers work feverishly, welding brass plates over the rupture. The repair holds, but barely.
You strip non-essential systems to patch the boiler. The vessel limps on, but with reduced capability.

choices.text: Send a crew member for help

outcome.description: A volunteer ventures out and returns with a traveling tinker who makes proper repairs—for a price.

events.title: Brass Baron's Gratitude
events.description: You encounter a stranded brass baron whose personal crawler broke down. After your crew assists with repairs, he offers generous compensation.

outcome.description: The baron hands over a chest of gleaming brass ingots, more than fair payment for the assistance.
The baron's attendants load your vessel with coal, food, and medical supplies.

choices.text: Ask for a letter of passage

outcome.description: The baron provides a sealed letter granting safe passage through territories controlled by the Steam Barons faction.

events.title: Gearwright's Innovation
events.description: Your lead gearwright approaches with blueprints for a modification that could improve vessel efficiency, but it requires resources to implement.

outcome.description: The gearwright's innovation proves successful. Your vessel now consumes less fuel during travel.
You acknowledge the innovation but explain resources are tight. The gearwright understands but seems disappointed.
Together you identify smaller optimizations that don't require significant resources. Minor improvements are made.

resources.name: Aether Crystals
resources.description: Crystallized aether energy, used to power advanced clockwork devices and airship engines.

resources.name: Clockwork Gears
resources.description: Precision-machined brass gears essential for automaton repair and vessel maintenance.

factions.name: Gear Guild
factions.description: A powerful union of engineers and mechanics who control most industrial production. Their approval opens many doors.

factions.name: Aether Pirates
factions.description: Sky-faring raiders who prey on trade routes from their hidden cloud fortresses.

factions.name: Automaton Collective
factions.description: A mysterious organization of self-aware automatons seeking equal rights in a human-dominated world.
